title: Exact Rational Convexity Checks

solver_reuse.target: bad midpoint-convexity and bad affine-threshold QF_LRA/Farkas regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Division-free midpoint-convexity conflict where f(-1)=0, f(0)=1, and f(1)=0 force the false inequality 2*f(0) <= f(-1)+f(1), plus an affine threshold shortfall where g(1/2) = -1/2 cannot satisfy g(x) >= 1.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional convexity rows only when they add distinct exact-rational midpoint families, separation, epigraph/feasibility, or threshold variants beyond the current affine row; keep general Jensen, separation, SDP, and convergence theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite convexity, monotonicity, and threshold checks as exact rational obligations.
Replay midpoint and grid convexity witnesses without floating-point tolerances.
Keep the bad midpoint-convexity and bad affine-threshold rows on Axeyum's checked Farkas evidence path.
Keep general convex analysis, separation theorems, SDP, and convergence proofs marked Lean-horizon until proof artifacts exist.
